overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character walking through a dimly lit space station lobby toward a 'Starsap Tours' travel agency booth. The environment features polished wooden flooring, glass display cases, and warm artificial lighting against dark metallic walls.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the lobby toward the Starsap Tours booth in the distance

entered.detail: illuminated travel agency booth with glowing 'STARSAP TOURS' signage and holographic planet displays
rectangular glass cases containing small objects and artifacts
industrial metal stairs with railings leading to upper level
long counter with green surface along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a spacious spaceport lobby with polished wooden floors, approaching a glowing Starsap Tours kiosk in the distance. Glass display cases line the right side while a metal staircase ascends in the background, and the environment is bathed in warm artificial lighting.

agents.ego_description: approaching the service counter of the Starsap Tours booth where an attendant stands

notable_agents.action: standing behind the counter at the Starsap Tours booth, facing the approaching character

entered.detail: glowing screens showing planetary destinations including 'TITAN' with celestial body graphics

segments.scene_description: Moving closer to the Starsap Tours booth, the character passes the display cases which fall behind, bringing the service counter and holographic destination screens into clear view. An NPC attendant stands ready behind the counter as the character approaches the illuminated kiosk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a spacious spaceport lobby that gradually narrows its focus toward a glowing travel agency kiosk. It begins with the character walking across polished wooden floors, passing glass display cases and a distant metal staircase under warm artificial lighting. As the character advances, the wide expanse of the lobby recedes and the display cases fall behind, bringing the Starsap Tours booth into clear view. The scene then shifts to a close-up perspective of the service counter and its holographic destination screens before finally coming to a halt in front of an NPC attendant waiting behind the illuminated kiosk.
